race.description: Race Day Medical Pty Ltd Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: PRAY DAY (5) has been below his best at his past couple on heavy tracks but could be a quick improver onto a synthetic surface here having posted good figures winning here on the turf three back. He draws perfectly for Mott and should take catching. ZESHADOW (3) can mix her form but has the peaks to win, perhaps not seeing out the longer trip last time. Back to a mile suits, she should run a bold race. ANALYTICAL (1) got the maiden out of the way at Werribee last time and can go on with it for the new yard now, he'll roll forward and be in this a long way. SHREWSBURY ROAD (7) doesn't win out of turn but can be strong late back in trip.
